payload.label: dining table
payload.long_description: Partial view of a reddish-brown polished rectangular wooden dining table with matching carved chairs at the near side; ornate circular/scroll chair backs and glossy solid-wood surface are visible in the edge-cropped frame, approximately 1.5 m from the camera.
